product: Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines updates are retained for 60 days
tagline: Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines update history is now retained for 60 days, up from 30 days.
what_it_does: Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines update history is now retained for 60 days, up from 30 days. The extended retention applies to updates shown in the pipeline UI and returned by the Pipelines REST API. Pipelines Terraform The Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines API allows you to create, edit, delete, start, and view details about pipelines.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines update history is now retained for 60 days, up from 30 days.
